parameters.subject: Understanding Your Herniated Disc Diagnosis
parameters.text:
Dear {{$node["Webhook Trigger"].json["body"]["patientName"]}},

It was a pleasure seeing you in the clinic.

To help you better understand your herniated disc diagnosis, we have put together a comprehensive guide detailing symptoms, conservative treatments, and surgical options.

Read more on our blog: https://www.drsayuj.info/blog/herniated-disc-treatment-options

Warm regards,
Dr. Sayuj's Clinical Team
parameters.html:
Your Post-Consultation Resources

Dear {{$node["Webhook Trigger"].json["body"]["patientName"]}},

It was a pleasure seeing you in the clinic recently to discuss your spinal health.

To help you better understand your herniated disc diagnosis and available treatment options (both conservative and surgical), we recommend reading our comprehensive patient guide:

Understanding Herniated Discs & Treatment Options

If you have any questions before your follow-up, please reply to this email.

Warm regards,
Dr. Sayuj's Clinical Team

parameters.subject: Is Spine Surgery Right For You?
parameters.text:
Dear {{$node["Webhook Trigger"].json["body"]["patientName"]}},

Following up on our recent consultation regarding your herniated disc.

Many patients wonder when conservative therapy is enough and when spine surgery becomes necessary. We've compiled a video resource to help answer your most pressing questions.

Watch our FAQ video: https://www.drsayuj.info/videos/spine-surgery-faq

Warm regards,
Dr. Sayuj's Clinical Team
parameters.html:
When is Spine Surgery the Right Step?

Dear {{$node["Webhook Trigger"].json["body"]["patientName"]}},

Following up on our recent consultation, many patients with a herniated disc wonder when conservative therapy is enough and when spine surgery might become necessary to restore quality of life.

We have created an educational video addressing the most common questions and concerns patients have regarding spinal procedures.

Watch the Spine Surgery FAQ Video

Warm regards,
Dr. Sayuj's Clinical Team

parameters.text:
Dear {{$node["Webhook Trigger"].json["body"]["patientName"]}},

Visit our patient education portal: https://www.drsayuj.info/patient-resources

Warm regards,
Dr. Sayuj's Clinical Team
